title: Our Trip to South Africa
excerpt: Over a year ago we traveled to South Africa so I could teach over 600 delegates at an amazing event . Several months later I made this video and I am finally sharing it here now. It captures mostly the…
body: Over a year ago we traveled to South Africa so I could teach over 600 delegates at an amazing event. Several months later I made this video and I am finally sharing it here now. It captures mostly the safari and our visit to Cape Town and was truly a trip of a lifetime. If you're interested in taking a trip there, I cannot recommend Kichaka enough. A 5 star experience that we will never forget. (Ok, now I have to remember to take more videos in general.) Enjoy the video and look out for the lions!
